testcase.name: addAndRemoveItemFromCart

failure.message: Cart counter did not update after removing! expected [0] but found [1]

testcase.name: testSortingZtoA

failure.message: Sorting dropdown value is incorrect! expected [Name (Z to A)] but found [Name (A to Z)]
